content: I just created https://github.com/gdcc/www.gdcc.io/pull/72 to add a page for the Internationalization working group at https://www.gdcc.io/working-groups.html along side other working group pages. Feedback is welcome!

Ha, I see the

I went ahead and merged the PR above. We're live! https://www.gdcc.io/working-groups/internationalization.html
If anyone wants edit access, please let me know. Otherwise, you are welcome to fork the repo and create a PR.
Note that there's a nice "edit on GitHub" button on the top right of the page. That's what I usually do for small edits.
Looks great! Thanks for the quick turnaround!
@Alyssa Conlon are you comfortable editing Markdown? Do you want me to give you edit access?
That'd be great :slight_smile:
@Alyssa Conlon sure, can you please accept the invite at https://github.com/gdcc ?

Great, now you're part of https://github.com/orgs/gdcc/teams/gdcc-website-write

Please edit away!
